customer_msg: How does per-seat pricing work for InvoiceFlow?

customer_msg: I'm getting a 403 Forbidden error when calling the TaskGrid REST API.
final_text:
A 403 Forbidden usually means your API key doesn't have the right permissions. Please check that your key has read+write scope enabled in Settings → API Keys. If the scope looks correct, try regenerating the key.

— LumenX Support

customer_msg: How do I integrate CalendarSync with our Slack workspace?
final_text:
To connect CalendarSync to Slack: go to Settings → Integrations → Slack, click Connect, and authorise the OAuth flow. Events will then sync to the Slack channel you select. Let me know if you hit any errors during the OAuth step.

— LumenX Support

customer_msg: Our webhook isn't receiving events from NoteHub. How do I debug this?
final_text:
First, confirm your webhook URL responds to a manual POST with 200 OK. Then check NoteHub → Settings → Webhooks for any delivery failures — we log the HTTP status and body for each attempt. If you see 5xx errors from your endpoint, that's usually a TLS or routing issue.

— LumenX Support

customer_msg: DataSync shows 'sync paused' but I haven't changed any settings.
final_text:
'Sync paused' usually means we received 3 consecutive auth errors from your connected account. Please re-authenticate your data source in Settings → Connected Accounts → DataSync. This clears the error state and resumes the sync.

— LumenX Support

customer_msg: I was charged twice this month for InvoiceFlow. I need a refund.

customer_msg: I cancelled within the first week but was still charged. Can I get a refund?

— LumenX Support

customer_msg: How do I cancel my TaskGrid subscription?

customer_msg: I downgraded my plan but the price didn't change on my invoice.

— LumenX Support

customer_msg: Can multiple team members share one NoteHub account?

— LumenX Support

customer_msg: What is the data retention policy for deleted notes in NoteHub?

Deleted notes are moved to Trash and retained for 30 days before permanent deletion. You can restore them any time during that window from the Trash view.

customer_msg: Does TaskGrid integrate with Jira or Linear?

customer_msg: Is there a mobile app for CalendarSync?

customer_msg: Can I export all my data from DataSync?
